2244240.name: The Verge Miner
2244240.description:
The Verge Miner is an exhilarating blend of mining, base defense, and action-packed roguelike gameplay, set on the very edge of the universe. In this immersive experience, players find themselves navigating through a vast expanse of asteroids, each filled with untold riches and lurking dangers. The game transports you to uncharted territories, where asteroids, teetering on the brink of the known cosmos, hold valuable resources waiting to be extracted. However, these isolated rocks are far from deserted; they are teeming with exogens, mysterious and hostile creatures that will stop at nothing to protect their domain.



As you traverse this hazardous environment, you must gather resources essential for your survival and progression. Mining these asteroids requires skill and precision, but the real challenge lies in defending your haul from relentless exogen attacks. Every moment is a test of your strategy and reflexes as you balance the delicate act of extraction and defense.



Will you focus on fortifying your base, or will you take the fight to the exogens, clearing the path for future mining expeditions?



To succeed in "The Verge Miner," you must tailor your approach to your play style. The game offers a diverse arsenal of gear and upgrades, allowing you to craft a loadout that suits your preferred strategy. Whether you favor heavy artillery to blast through enemies or advanced mining tools to maximize your resource yield, the choice is yours. Each decision impacts your journey, making every playthrough a unique adventure.



Prepare to venture into the unknown, where danger and opportunity coexist in every corner of the galaxy. "The Verge Miner" challenges you to master the art of survival on the universe's edge, where only the strongest and most resourceful will thrive. Will you conquer the asteroids and emerge victorious, or will you be overwhelmed by the relentless forces of the Verge? The fate of your mining empire lies in your hands.
2244240.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*, 德语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 日语*, 韩语*, 波兰语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙*, 俄语*, 简体中文*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*, 繁体中文*, 土耳其语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
